items.headline: Todd Diganci Joins Broadridge Board As Regulatory Oversight Gains Focus
items.summary: Broadridge Financial Solutions (NYSE:BR) has appointed Todd Diganci to its Board of Directors. Diganci will also serve on the Audit Committee, bringing experience in financial and regulatory oversight. His background includes senior leadership roles focused on U.S. securities regulation and financial stewardship. Broadridge Financial Solutions, trading at $146.44, has seen its share price decline 4.0% over the past week and 1.8% over the past month. Returns are also down 33.6% year to date...
